frameworks.name: neurovascular coupling
frameworks.one_line: cortical hemodynamic response indexes neurostimulation-evoked activation

core_question: How consistently does combined tDCS-fNIRS reveal cortical hemodynamic responses to neurostimulation across studies?
key_assumptions: oxygenated hemoglobin tracks underlying neural activation
anodal tDCS increases excitability in the stimulated region
key_findings: anodal tDCS produced a small but consistent increase in oxygenated hemoglobin at the stimulated region
study-design factors explained most of the between-study heterogeneity
interpretations: tDCS-fNIRS is a maturing biomarker for tracking online neurostimulation effects
limitations_noted: heterogeneity across montage, current intensity, and fNIRS sampling
